  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    Mk                   bsd.sites.mk 
  Log:
  Creation of MASTER_SITE_OPENBSD macro in bsd.sites.mk
  
          Included patch for bsd.sites.mk created a new macro called
          MASTER_SITE_OPENBSD that contains a list of OpenBSD mirrors.
